description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, elongated black metal slide and frame, complemented by contrasting white grip panels on both sides. The grip panels are smooth with a subtle marbled pattern and a single visible fastener, providing a visually distinct accent. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, enclosing a curved trigger, while the barrel is long and unadorned, extending slightly beyond the slide. The top of the slide features simple iron sights, and the rear of the slide has serrations for improved grip during operation. The magazine base is minimally visible, appearing flush with the grip and lacking any pronounced extension or embellishment.
description: A black semi-automatic handgun with white marbled grips, a long barrel, and a rounded trigger guard. The design is sleek and modern, with minimal external markings and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the white marbled grip panel, black slide, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the narrow profile of the slide.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the white grip panel, slide serrations, and the ejection port area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the slide, rear sight, and the magazine base flush with the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features smooth, white panels with a subtle marbled pattern and a single round fastener visible on each side. The shape is slightly contoured for ergonomic comfort, with a gentle curve that fits the palm. The surface lacks aggressive texturing, providing a clean and polished appearance. No finger grooves, logos, or additional embellishments are present, giving the grip a minimalist and classic look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. Its curvature is smooth without any squared-off edges or undercuts, and there are no visible reinforcements or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, with no texturing or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a standard profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior finish matches the black slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: No visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions are present on the slide. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a flat and smooth design. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing visible, resulting in a streamlined and unobtrusive appearance.
